tokens.name: Layoffs / SOL

Based on the provided data, I will output dynamic trading parameters specific to the Layoffs / SOL token.

**Stop Loss:**

**Time Frame:**

**Final Decision:**
BUY | Limit:-5% | TP:+10% | SL:-9% | Time:3h

Note that this analysis is based on specific data points provided and may not reflect the actual market conditions or future performance of the token. It's essential to continually monitor and adjust trading parameters as market conditions change.
